allow: Bash(powershell -command "Get-Item ''HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\IIS Extensions\\IIS AspNetCore Module V2'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Property; if \(Test-Path ''C:\\Program Files\\IIS\\Asp.Net Core Module\\V2\\aspnetcorev2.dll''\) { Write-Host ''Module DLL found'' } else { Write-Host ''Module DLL NOT found'' }; ls ''C:\\inetpub\\wwwroot\\KidsAI\\wwwroot'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")

Bash(powershell -command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force ''C:\\inetpub\\wwwroot\\KidsAI\\logs'' | Out-Null; \(Get-Content ''C:\\inetpub\\wwwroot\\KidsAI\\web.config''\) -replace ''stdoutLogEnabled=""false""'', ''stdoutLogEnabled=""true""'' | Set-Content ''C:\\inetpub\\wwwroot\\KidsAI\\web.config''; Write-Host ''Logging enabled''")
Bash(powershell -command "Get-EventLog -LogName Application -Source ''IIS AspNetCore Module V2'' -Newest 5 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object TimeGenerated, Message | Format-List")
